OBJECTION TO THE DECLARATION OF CHRISTOPHER J. BAUMAN SUBMITTED WITH PETITIONERS REPLY BRIEF (TRANSACTION ID # 100146245) FILED BY RESPONDENT BAALBAKI, KHODOR INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUISNESS AS KODORSKI DESIGN

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR COSTS AND FEES IS DENIED. THE FEES INCURRED IN BRINGING THIS PETITION FOR FAILURE TO FILE AN ACTION WITHIN 90 DAYS WERE NOT REASONABLY INCURRED. THE STATUTES PROVIDE FOR A SIMPLE MECHANISM TO AVOID THE FILING OF THE PETITION BY PROVIDING NOTICE AS TO THE BASIS FOR THE REQUEST TO RELEASE THE MECHANICS LIEN. NO EVIDENCE IS PROVIDED BY THE MOVING PARTY THAT 90-DAY EXPIRATION ISSUE WAS BROUGHT TO RESPONDENT'S ATTENTION VIA A FORMAL NOTICE OR OTHERWISE BEFORE THIS PETITION WAS FILED AND THE FEES WERE INCURRED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs And Reasonable Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Bauman, Esq., Steyer Lowenthal Boodrakas Alvarez & Smith LLP, (415) 421-3400, cbauman@steyerlaw.com, for Petitioner Wisfe Aish/Moving Party
Douglas Atkinson, Esq., ATKINSON & ASSOCIATES, (415) 793-7819, doug@accidentlawsf.com, for KHODOR BAALBAKI Defendant
Not Reported

Petitioner contests the Court's tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS WISFE AISH, WA-SFCT LLC, 288 27TH STREET LLC, A&M PROPERTIES, L.P.'S Motion For Costs And Reasonable Attorneys Fees

Petitioner's Motion for Costs and Fees is DENIED. The fees incurred in bringing this petition for failure to file an action within 90 days were not reasonably incurred. The statutes provide for a simple mechanism to avoid the filing of the Petition by providing notice as to the basis for the request to release the mechanics lien. No evidence is provided by the moving party that 90-day expiration issue was brought to respondent's attention via a formal notice or otherwise before this petition was filed and the fees were incurred.
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Release Of Mechanics Liens
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER WISFE AISH, WA-SFCT LLC, 288 27TH STREET LLC, A&M PROPERTIES, L.P. Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Release Of Mechanics Liens is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Releases recorded on September 17, 2021.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
